schema.type: string — one of: Consulting Project, Enterprise Contract, Workshop, Speaking Engagement, Paid Advisory Call, Grant, Partnership, Product Idea, Licensing
schema.title: string
schema.sourceRef: string — id from opportunities.json, company-intelligence.json, or product-backlog.json this came from, if any
schema.expectedRevenue: number or string — amount or range, with currency
schema.stage: string — identified, qualified, in-progress, won, lost, deferred
schema.owner: string — who is driving this (usually Ramya, sometimes Sales Director)
